case_title: BANK ONE, LAFAYETTE N.A. vs. PERERA, DAMIEM J, et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE, LAFAYETTE N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PERERA, DAMIEM J DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-24-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-04-1996

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT, DECLARATION, ORDER BY JUDGE WICK #4; INCLUDING BY PUBLICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE, LAFAYETTE N.A. TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL MAR-12-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-12-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE OR A SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $129.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PERERA, DAMIEM J

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK ONE, LAFAYETTE N.A.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE, LAFAYETTE N.A. JUDGMENT OF MAY-13-1996 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
